phrases.text_local: Pode me dar a rota mais rápida para a Porta da Ferragem?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih MIH DAHR AH RAW-tuh MEYESH RAH-pee-duh PUH-ruh AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH feh-RAH-zhayng?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Porta da Ferragem.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH feh-RAH-zhayng.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Porta da Ferragem.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Porta da Ferragem.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH feh-RAH-zhayng.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Porta da Ferragem.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Circuito da Pena 434 stops
phrases.text_local: Onde para o autocarro 434 do Circuito da Pena?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PUH-ruh AW ow-too-KAH-roo KWAHT-roo-sayng-too-zheet-reen-tuheek-waht-roo DOO see-ruh-KOOEE-too DUH PEH-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Circuito da Pena 434 is the main shuttle bus to Pena Palace. The stop is clearly marked with a sign.

likely_response.translation_en: Right here, this is the stop.

responses.english: Right here, this is the stop.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Porta da Ferragem is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Porta da Ferragem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH feh-RAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: Local transit staff prioritize concise, landmark-based spatial references.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Porta da Ferragem.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh PAW-ruh-tuh DUH feh-RAH-zhayng.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Porta da Ferragem.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Porta da Ferragem.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh PAW-ruh-tuh DUH feh-RAH-zhayng.
responses.french: Siga as placas para Porta da Ferragem.
